Container.Name: IPFS CID Docker
Container.Overview: Lightweight IPFS sidecar that scans mounted files under /mnt, stores file-to-CID state in SQLite under /config, and republishes changed files automatically. The first scan runs on startup once IPFS is ready. Upload throttling is disabled by default in this Unraid template; if you enable UPLOAD_BANDWIDTH_LIMIT, leave Extra Parameters set to --cap-add=NET_ADMIN. Auto mode will try tbf, htb, then netem rate shaping.

Config.Name: Gateway Port
Config.Description: IPFS gateway port used for /ipfs/<cid> access.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: IPFS API port.

Config.Name: Swarm TCP Port
Config.Description: IPFS swarm TCP port.

Config.Name: Swarm UDP Port
Config.Description: IPFS swarm UDP port.

Config.Name: Config Storage
Config.Description: Persistent IPFS repo, SQLite database, and exported manifest.

Config.Name: Scan Path 1
Config.Description: Optional host folder to scan. Add more host paths under /mnt/... if needed.

Config.Name: Scan Path 2
Config.Description: Optional second scan path.

Config.Name: Scan Path 3
Config.Description: Optional third scan path.

Config.Name: CONFIG_PATH
Config.Description: Root path for persistent state inside the container.

Config.Name: SCAN_PATHS
Config.Description: Comma-separated scan roots under /mnt. Leave as /mnt for zero-config behavior.

Config.Name: RESCAN_INTERVAL
Config.Description: Delay between scans after the initial startup import, for example 30s, 10m, or 1h 30m.

Config.Name: SCAN_PRIORITY
Config.Description: high, normal, or low.

Config.Name: UPLOAD_BANDWIDTH_LIMIT
Config.Description: Optional outbound bandwidth cap such as 10mbit or 5MiB/s. Requires Extra Parameters to keep --cap-add=NET_ADMIN.

Config.Name: UPLOAD_BANDWIDTH_METHOD
Config.Description: Bandwidth shaping method: auto, tbf, htb, or netem. Auto tries multiple Linux qdisc types for better host compatibility.

Config.Name: UPLOAD_BANDWIDTH_REQUIRED
Config.Description: Set to true to fail startup if no bandwidth shaping method can be applied.

Config.Name: IPFS_PROFILE
Config.Description: Comma-separated Kubo config profiles applied only when the repo is first initialized.

Config.Name: IPFS_PATH
Config.Description: IPFS repo path inside the container.

Config.Name: INDEX_DB_PATH
Config.Description: SQLite database path inside the container.

Config.Name: INDEX_EXPORT_PATH
Config.Description: Exported active manifest path inside the container.

Config.Name: BANDWIDTH_INTERFACE
Config.Description: Optional override for the Linux interface used by tc if auto-detection picks the wrong one.
